zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Poole於1520年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，她的父親Leonard Poole Esq44歲，母親Katherine Brydges23歲。她和Thomas Ryder至少有2個兒子。她去世於1606年9月3日在英國米德萊可堂爾 哈姆勒次享年86歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾霍德特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Poole于1520年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，她的父亲Leonard Poole Esq44岁，母亲Katherine Brydges23岁。她和Thomas Ryder至少有2个儿子。她去世于1606年9月3日在英国米德萊可堂爾 哈姆勒次享年86岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾霍德特。

nameMeanings.name: Poole
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English pol(e), polle, poul(e) ‘pool, pond’ (Old English pōl). The name may be topographic, for someone who lived by a pool, or habitative, from a place so named.
English: variant of   Paul  .
Possibly an Americanized form of German Puhl or Pfuhl(e) (see Pool 4).

variants.name: Pool
meanings: English: variant of   Poole   or   Paul  .
Jewish (from the Netherlands) and Dutch: ethnic name for someone from Poland.
Americanized form of German   Puhl  .

variants.name: Pooler
meanings: English (Shropshire and Staffordshire): topographic name for someone who lived near a pool, or a habitational name for someone from a place called with this word (see   Poole  ).
Americanized form of French   Poulin   ‘young animal, colt’.
In some cases also an Americanized form of German Pfuhler, a variant of Pfuhl + -er, suffix denoting an inhabitant.

variants.name: Paul
meanings: English, French, German, Dutch, Swedish, West Indian (mainly Haiti, also e.g. Saint Lucia), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the personal name Paul (from Latin Paulus ‘small’), which has always been popular in Christendom. It was the name adopted by the Pharisee Saul of Tarsus after his conversion to Christianity on the road to Damascus in about AD 34. He was a most energetic missionary to the Gentiles in the Roman Empire, and played a very significant role in establishing Christianity as a major world religion. The name was borne also by numerous other early Christian saints. It is also occasionally borne by Jews; the reasons for this are not clear. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages and their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Pavlis , Slovenian Pavel and Pavlič (see Pavlic ), Polish Paweł (see Pawel ) and Pawlicki , Assyrian/Chaldean Polous and Polus . In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (see 2 below).
Breton (mainly Finistère): from a Frenchified form of the personal name Paol, Breton form of Paul .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phóil ‘son of Paul’. Compare McFall .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Poole was born in 1520, in Staffordshire, England, her father, Leonard Poole Esq, was 44 and her mother, Katherine Brydges, was 23. She had at least 2 sons with Thomas Ryder. She died on 3 September 1606, in Tower Hamlets, Middlesex, England, at the age of 86, and was buried in Hodnet, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Poole est née en 1520, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Leonard Poole Esq, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Katherine Brydges, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Thomas Ryder. Elle est décédée le 3 septembre 1606, à Tower Hamlets, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Hodnet, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Poole 1520 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Leonard Poole Esq 44 und ihre Mutter Katherine Brydges 23. Sie hatte mit Thomas Ryder mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 3. September 1606 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Tower Hamlets, Middlesex, England und wurde in Hodnet, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Poole è nata il nel 1520 nel Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Leonard Poole Esq, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Katherine Brydges, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Thomas Ryder. Morì il 3 settembre 1606, nel Tower Hamlets, Middlesex, England, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolta a Hodnet, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Pooleが1520年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Leonard Poole Esqは44歳，母Katherine Brydgesは23歳であった。彼女はThomas Ryderとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1606年9月3日にイギリスミッドレセックストウエル ハムレツで86歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアホードネットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Poole(이)가 1520년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Leonard Poole Esq(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Brydges(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Thomas Ryder(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1606년 9월 3일 영국 미들레세스 타워 함레츠에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 호드넷에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Poole nasceu em 1520, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Leonard Poole Esq, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Brydges, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Thomas Ryder. Ela faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1606, em Tower Hamlets, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em Hodnet, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Poole родилась в 1520 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Leonard Poole Esq было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Brydges, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Thomas Ryder. Она умерла 3 сентября 1606 г. в местности тоуир хамлец, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности ходнет, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Poole nació en 1520, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Leonard Poole Esq, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Katherine Brydges, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Thomas Ryder. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1606, en Tower Hamlets, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Hodnet, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
